Hey everyone! 👋

I’m super excited to share that LinktoDM is now live on Product Hunt! 🚀

  

🎯 What is LinktoDM?

It’s a powerful Instagram automation tool that helps you:

 Auto-send DMs to users who comment on your posts/reels
 Build Chat Automation flows using a simple conversational format — no complicated logic nodes like other tools!
 Grow your followers with our unique Ask to Follow feature
 Instantly reply to story reactions
 Use AI-powered replies for comments and messages
 Track performance with a smart analytics dashboard

Coming up with original ways to engage and comment on Instagram can be really time-consuming. While automating commenting can be a useful way to save time and manage your social media presence, it’s important to maintain authenticity when doing so. That's why I built Comment Generator. A Chrome extension that helps you write genuine, authentic comments with ease.
